title: oldenlandia prostrata
intro: Oldenlandia prostrata is a perennial herb belonging to the family Rubiaceae, commonly found in tropical regions and is also known as creeping Oldenlandia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Oldenlandia prostrata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit hepatoprotective effects. Herbal preparations of Oldenlandia prostrata can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or by decocting the plant material in water, and it is often used in traditional remedies to treat various ailments.
